title: Nicolas Castellanos / Sentinel One Team - Sync
meeting_title: Nicolas Castellanos / Sentinel One Team - Sync

transcript.text: Have you gone through any onboarding yet?
Gotten the SentinelOne email, anything like that?
They have everything kind of routed through there.
Let's see about getting access to GitHub.
I assume they probably haven't given GitHub access yet.
I don't know if I have to add that, the email to my own.
GitHub, or should it be a separate GitHub account, I don't know?
You will need a SentinelOne GitHub account, yeah.
That's how they like to do it, yeah.
Let's see, I'm putting in a request for Nico, but I don't get it yet.
Sorry, it's kind of crazy already today.
I'll be Nico in this project.
I know we owe you something.
Can you tell us what we owe you?
I don't know if Marcus got, I think he got the email already.
Did you, John, did you request GitHub access for Nicolas?
Yeah, I'm adding a comment on there now to see if I can get Marcus added on the same ticket.
But is that blocked with an approval from Mahati or something because she's traveling?
Okay, so why, do you know why it's not moving?
It says it's assigned to Kenneth.
Oh, just ping him on Slack.
That's what I was going to do afterwards.
Yeah, at least it is good that it is Kenneth, so that's nice.
Okay, so yeah, try to add, let's try to add Marcus there.
And then the other thing, I will...
And in a ticket for Marcus for ContentStack, and then invite him just through ContentStack.
Is there anything else that you need from us?
It's really ContentStack and GitHub, right?
Yeah, yeah, because then Algolia, I mean, you have it set up, like, between ContentStack and Algolia.
So we, yeah, we don't need access to that.
Oh, I did complete the training.
...who have to, because today it was a delay.
I don't know if he got the thing or not.
No, it's funny because, so in our org, officially, you report to Mahati.
So, like, if you're, like, in Workday, then you're on the...
And what happens is if you do not complete the training, the manager is getting...
Yeah, yeah, when I saw the emails, it was like a bunch of emails I didn't see.

I don't worry about it, it happens all the time, like I'm always late, it has to happen, and you don't want to do it, so you always push it in front of you, and then until the day that the manager calls you, like, you have to complete your training, okay.
So yeah, I apologize, Marcus, you got your email on Friday or on Monday.
We had a big release yesterday, John and I, and we lost half our day on some issues that were not planned for.
Luckily, we were able to mitigate these issues, but I will get right on it now.
So you have the new, the new site right now?
Just one section of it, yeah, Cybersecurity 101, if you're curious.
I want to look at it.
And then, yeah, if you don't have any questions, then we'll it short.
But do you have an ETA?
Like when we talked to Ankit, and then you guys are working on like a release plan, like a?
Yeah, today, just from my side, so I'm finishing the automated.
We are generating a bunch of pages, CVs, and I'm finishing the automated publishing to content stack to a temporary account.
I have a content stack instance that has some structure as yours, so we can publish automatically.
So the next step, that's what I want to, just to give you an ETA, is to build the index page.
Or the page that we're going to be the public page.
First, I just started some data.
Yeah, let me, I will do this right away.
Do you guys want to review, like, the content type on content stack?
Then I'll see if I can send, like, those content types either today or tomorrow and let you know.
When it's up, to your content stack.
I'll create a new branch, as we spoke last time, and upload them there.
We are also prepping for another release on Tuesday.
And we are, and we have a holiday on Monday.
So, I don't, I don't, I don't think he will reply right away.
But, we absolutely need to stay in the loop.
And that's so that we know what's going on.
Yeah, if we don't have anything more, then I think we should be good.
I'm going to do the content stack thing now, Marcus, for you.
I'll let you know, you are both in Slack, right?
I reached out to our contact that has control over GitHub.
I'll let you know when I hear back from him.
You might have to accept an invite or something, so I'll just let you know.
If you can both, actually, before that, set up a GitHub account with the SentinelOne email, if you haven't already, and send me your usernames.
Does it, does it work if we add the email to our account?
No, they like to have, like...
So just set up an account with just your SentinelOne email and send me your username.
Usually they'll just do whatever-SentinelOne is the username.
Just send them to me and I'll make sure he has those.
That'll make it a little easier.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between GrowthX and SentinelOne teams to discuss onboarding, access requirements, and project updates.](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcus (GrowthX) needs GitHub and ContentStack access; John is expediting the process](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Nicolas completed required training; GrowthX team progressing on automated publishing to ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [SentinelOne team busy with recent release and prep for upcoming Tuesday release (Monday is a holiday)](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Content type review for ContentStack pending; Nicolas to send updates soon](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding and Access Requirements

  - [Marcus has SentinelOne email access through Octa](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [GitHub access pending for both Marcus and Nicolas](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
      - [John submitted request, assigned to Kenneth](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
      - [Joery suggested pinging Kenneth on Slack to expedite](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [ContentStack access needed for Marcus](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Joery to create ticket and invite directly through ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Both Marcus and Nicolas need to create separate GitHub accounts with SentinelOne emails](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [Usernames typically formatted as \[name\]-SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [Team members to send new GitHub usernames to John](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### Project Updates

  - [Marcus working on automated publishing to ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [Using temporary ContentStack instance with similar structure](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [Next step: building index/public page](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Nicolas to review and send ContentStack content types](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [Will create new branch for uploading content types](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [SentinelOne partially launched new site section: Cybersecurity 101](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### Team Workload and Availability

  - [SentinelOne team faced unexpected issues during recent release](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [Half-day lost to mitigation efforts](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Preparing for another release on Tuesday (Oct 14, 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Monday (Oct 13, 2025) is a holiday for SentinelOne team](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [John particularly busy; may have delayed responses](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Training Completion

  - [Nicolas completed required training](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Training completion emails go to manager (Mahati) if not completed on time](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcus and Nicolas: Create GitHub accounts with SentinelOne emails, send usernames to John](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [John: Follow up with Kenneth on GitHub access requests](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Joery: Create ContentStack access ticket for Marcus, send direct invite](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Nicolas: Send ContentStack content types for review (today or tomorrow)](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [GrowthX team: Continue work on automated publishing and index page development](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [SentinelOne team: Prepare for Tuesday's release while managing current workload](https://fathom.video/share/nUgxJMycfNszyPqzJUKnchAyT_a1prxc?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

action_items.description: Ping Kenneth on Slack re GitHub access request for Nicolas and Marcus
Create ContentStack access ticket for Marcus; invite him to ContentStack
Send ContentStack content types to John/Joery for review (today/tomorrow)
Create new GitHub acct w/ S1 email; send username to John
Create new GitHub acct w/ S1 email; send username to John
